# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-application
          image: your-web-application-image
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 2
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-workers
          image: your-background-workers-image
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
  selector:
    app: memcached
---
Note: Replace "your-web-application-image" and "your-background-workers-image" with actual image names for your web application and background workers.
